reviews.review_description: I love sniper elite. All of them.....this one was weak in every aspect tho. Honestly the biggest complaint is the price. The game needs to be 10 dollars, 20 dollars max.

I was able to complete the first two missions but the third one where I had to destroy a tank in the snow. It doesn’t even give you A 2nd to react it would be more fun if the reinforcements didn’t come after you destroyed the tank I prefer middle of honour above and beyond. I really don’t like this game. Nothing could make me change my mind about this game. And if my vr starts working again I will try again now that I’m better at stealth games and war games update: I guess it was just my experience so now I love it I know I says that nothing can change my mind but now that I’m older and more experienced than I was I now love it
Don’t listen to these one star people this game is very fun I played the first one on psvr 1 that was fun too worth it
Good

reviews.review_title: This one was actually better, but short
reviews.review_description:
Basically making you pay for a stand alone DLC, which happens to have fixed all the major problems with the other Sniper Elite VR. Being able to turn off that stupid vignette when crouching is awesome, as it completely destroyed the other game for me, as it didn’t have any option to get rid of it, and they haven’t updated it to fix it ever. This company seriously needs to listen better, and fix the issues still plaguing the past game. Why isn’t there any hot fixes for that one? 
    With all this said, I will say this was the best couple hours you will play, but should only cost $10 at most, as I said it’s like 3 missions, and then packed full of crap fillers to play after. Come on Rebellion I expect so much better then this for you. What is it Sony paying you more for the better versions on their trash headset?

Not sure why the score & reviews are so low, I knew what I was getting a DLC essentially, short mission DLC.
You can not fault the gameplay, using the sniper rifle just always feels so vid to use with kill camera.
It certainly is a tense adventure, yes I would have liked more, but that’s because I really enjoyed the game.
Anymore coming that would be great.
Yes balls not ball still 5 star
all the levels are good but bringing down the beast that's why i'm rating this 4 stars
Was one of my first VR games. Had a blast. Wish it had more replay value. But still worth it to play again once and a while.
It’s a awesome game but if your a normal gamer just to have fun it will maybe hard depends if your a tryhard but it was hard for me to play because I don’t have steady hands😝
This game is really good I don’t get why you are all complaining so if your planning on buying it do it good graphics brilliant story and is over all a good game

reviews.review_title: Be a good game if it didn't suck so much
reviews.review_description: Started off being a good game until I got to one part of it and then where you got to blow the tank up but then it just started saying you was out of balance all the time and one let you pick up weapons and everything else and just kept repeating the board one let you go any progress any further please fix if  you can
The Germans need to actually get behind crates instead of just goingup in one single spot where they look like they’re mixed together ￼

Kind of a waste of 15$, the detection system is so dumb. If you get noticed by one person, enemy's within 15 miles will shoot at you. You can't hide the body's so if that body gets see  you are cooked, no gun customization, hardly any stealth, you can't search the body's, campaign is too short, in other sniper elite games it takes like almost 30 minutes to do a mission, it takes 10 minutes to do one in the game, no freedom to plan how you are gonna do the mission, maps are small, not that many weapons. Now getting to shoot Hitler in the balls is the best part.

I’m trying to pass the mission where you gotta kill the other snipers, and half my shots I pull the trigger and the gun doesn’t fire, yes I’m bolting? No I’m not aiming at a wall. Yes I’m aiming DIRECTLY a Germans chest, it’s frickin bullcrap, the game is still fun though so I gotta give it that

This could be such an amazing game if they didn't get lazy. Everything looks great but the gameplay is god awful. DO NOT spend money on this. If it's on sale or free then I'd give it a shot otherwise there's WAY better alternatives.

Let me say the first sniper elite was truly amazing and I recommend it to anyone who haven't played the second one don't know if it's my copy it's too dark I'm stuck on the first level in a dark room that I can't see anything I found the key and still can't get out I'm not able to move on a progress I've been stuck for months trying to figure it out I've watched tutorials and videos most people easily get out but I seem to be stuck I can't even give a proper assessment of the game without even getting past the first level but I will say as far as the graphics go it's horrible compared to the first one I wish you guys do a remake and make it just as good as the first one which was truly amazing and unforgettable experience or at least do some type of update or we make to this game so we all can give a great assessment but for now it's sad to say that I have to give one star to this one and I would give 10 to the first one if I could please do something greater because sniper elite is a great game sniper elite sequel is horrible from my experience because I can't progress and I can't move on to see if the game changes at any point everyone is given a greater review and I wish I could but at this point I cannot please see what you can do to change my mind I look forward to it thank you
One of the best ww2 games there is I love the guns there so realistic but add bayonets

reviews.review_title: I LOVED the slow mo cutscene highly best
reviews.review_description: Snipe

The game is so good.I like the way you can assassinate an officer for more information to solve the problem.The only bad think is that when you punch a soldier it does not knock them out,it just stuns them. ￼

reviews.review_title: Just as good as the first game
reviews.review_description: Also love the main menu music, I like to just lay down and listen to it play for like 20 minutes.
Would be a fun game but is uncomfortable to use and its a loss of 12 pound.

I’ve played all of the 2D versions of this game and have always enjoyed them. Not sure why this game doesn’t have better ratings! You’re able to mark enemies, shoot while your rifle is masked by artillery fire and the classic bullet cam when hitting your target. I highly recommend it!
Person

This should've been a couple bonus missions, You can quickly finish in one playthrough and its just some repurposed low effort game with snow thrown in. It should be $5 tops. Loved tbe original but save your money.
If ur into snipping I recommend this played in my room and I mounted my controllers on my bed and I felt like I was a real sniper soo good
I can get past “Bringing down the beast”

There isnt enough saves you cant do anything when i hit one in the head it said 10 damage and i was geting swarmed and i couldnt do anything i died at the end of a level once because the melee wasent working its glitchy cant play it normally to much popups even when ive already saw them and it annoys me and i hate the game its the worst game i have on my quest

reviews.review_title: It good and gets hard at the 4th mission
reviews.review_description: It's a good fun annoying little......game but gets my adrenaline pumping so I broke my head as I failed 10 or 20 times but funniest 82 hours of my life

It is easy to play and is fun but the last mission is really hard after you snipe hitler and there are only 5 missions and I completed it in like two hours. And I think they definitely should add more guns and more missions.
SOOOOOOOOO FUN when u focus on an enemy and shoot it gives u an animation where it shows where u hit its so cool I LOVEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEE IT SOOOOOOO MUCH

Really good game ! " Pay no mind to ratings " they have no clue !   Get it play it and have fun !!   VR is best way to play games like this , PlayStation and Xbox console too much money and not as fun as " really turning your head to look around corners " it puts you " Johnny on the spot into the game"  get this game and have fun !  Toss those consoles !! ( You can play all those on quest 2-3 with app and a Bluetooth controller,  have fun VR is the way to go !!  Keep the over priced consoles !  And flat screen play ! Have fun folks !!

This is my first game on VR, and once I got used to the mechanics I have enjoyed it. Having played sniper elite on consoles it was weird hearing a different voice for the main character,  but that soon past. The weapons have a realistic feel to them, and test your skill. The graphics and good as I would expect from sniper elite.  Overall  this is a very good game and I look forward to trying sniper elite VR

reviews.review_title: Next sniper elite vr game idea
reviews.review_description:
I think for a final level idea, make it on a train. hear me out, but killing Hitler on a train would be very cool.

here’s how it’s going to go, your mission is to destroy a Nazi train with explosives so you can kill Hitler, you kill a couple Nazis here and there and then you placed on the bottoms, but it doesn’t work so you get on another train to try and kill the engineer(the one on your train). once you kill the engineer, now your mission is to control the train, so it collides with the other train off a bridge. Now all the Nazis has been killed, Hitler is left. hanging on the edge of the bridge, you shoot his hand, and he dies, the reinforcements are coming, the last battle. you kill the last Nazi and you leave. end of both missions, and also add new weapons, and add multiplayer games, so the whole community can enjoy it together and also make it on quest 2.
Couldn't get thru the 2nd gun in tutorial. No matter what I did the mag wouldn't load with ammo. Waste of money.

developer_response.body:
Hey there!

We're really sorry to hear you're having trouble with the tutorial. We'd love to get to the bottom of this with you, to see if we can help.
Please pop your issue to us using the link below and our Player Support will do everything they can to support you.

https://support.rebellion.com/hc/en-gb/categories/14299035627165

reviews.review_description: I couldn't work out all the 'tricky' controls for this game and found there was very little to no help within th game itself.  I couldn't even work out how to let the handle go to get the targets to pop up in the cadet mode.  Very disappointing and probably will uninstall it 😔

developer_response.body: Hello Hazel. The Partisan HQ is a great way to get used to the weapons you will use in game. To get the targets to pop up, make sure you have a weapon to hand, then head over to the lever, pull down then release. Once you're in front of the range the targets should appear.

reviews.review_description: Bestial games

If you played and liked the first one, then you will probably like this one too. It is not as long as the first one, witch makes the price reasonable. 

I hope they make an other one, I will definitely buy.
First getting into the game was exciting. But it was too repetitive and got boring after awhile.  The narration was ok but after repeatedly hearing the same voiceover, became very agitating.

Not really happy 6 levels ish 

Was so looking forward for this.  When the game finished. Lots of ppl in list they must not of done much 

I thought they might of gone to town and really.  Made a big game  it’s been one of my best games  to be a sniper 

I just think we deserve more.  Please make more levels.  Or make it sandbox 

So we vr ppl  could make our own levels  and really come up with sone great ideas.   I was hoping for.  More. Game.

reviews.review_title: New to the series.  Great game play
reviews.review_description: Beardobanjo , I can understand how you take this and give it a three. Expecting more etc.  However I have not picked up a.game.in twenty years and my son's play plenty enough so I don't have too, however I purchased a quest two a few months ago and did not find the right "click" with me. Mind you I played resident evil one on the PS1 back in 95-96 to the point I could finish the game within an 30 minutes or less.   That game had the same "click" and playing games.simce the age.of ten on the vic 20 commodore 64.  It's games like this draws me back into the world of gaming. Great pricing , will purchase part one. And  now I expect.a few years with the quest , since I am purchasing the quest 3 and.I hope this team on sniper elite continue forward with the series and be able to get the OG s....back into the world. 10/5 stars.
My favourite vr game ever
£1.99 DLC, at best.
Enjoy very much the story and gameplay 👌👌
I love this game is really fun sneaking up and hitting them with the weapons and them enemies have great aim sheesh I really enjoyed the game
horrible game

Good story line. Challenging. Somewhat difficult to hold scoped rifle on target

reviews.review_title: A sniper game without sniper activity
reviews.review_description:
Imagine this: you search for "sniper" and find this game, probably because it talks about being a sniper.  Then you purchase the game.  After time on the shooting range, learning all the weapons, you jump into the first level and....  Wait, there isn't any sniper activity here.

I've played a few levels.  So far it has all been "follow this specific path" and engage in melee scenarios.
I finally made it to an open airfield level...  Depressing.  One shot to start the level.  I then scope out the field, searching for enemies, and there are none.  As I cross the airfield I go to a high spot and survey everything ahead: no enemies in sight.  The enemies don't spawn until I go around the other side of this raised area and discover them waiting in ambush.  Back to melee.   I mean, sure, I could use the sniper rifle but I'm still standing in range of their weapons.

I may as well be playing the original Quake.

reviews.review_title: In this app there is a lack of tutorials
reviews.review_description:
How can someone learn to use this app without tutorials? 

If it exist, I ask you, where could I find it? 

I beg you give me that information.

Or tell me how can I ask the refund.

Thanks

Great game. One of the best  shooter games I've played. Having grown up hearing my grandfather talk about his WW2 experiences it's pretty cool being able to play something similar to what he went through

reviews.review_title: Amazing first game ever on VR
reviews.review_description:
Newbie VR user who bought this game over holidays. After initial struggle with using weapons was able to manage to learn and adapt. 

Extremely well designed game, graphics are really nice with not too loud music perfect scene 

Each level gave sense of accomplishment and wanted to play more. I hope they will add some more updates and stories to continue to play
i see some people hating on this game and personally, i never played Sniper Elite VR before this game. i very much enjoy it.

reviews.review_description:
Can you add a lot more enemy combatants? Easy to clear out what’s there. 

Also can you add a difficulty setting so we can ramp up the enemy count and intensity of attack? 

I tend to use the silenced pistol for all levels and it’s pretty easy to overcome the current state of resistance. 

Cheers, apart from that I like this game but need more of the above (if possible)
This game won’t even make it through the gun range. It keeps messing up. I haven’t even really been able to play it.  I tried exiting. The game isn’t letting me. No sign for door.

developer_response.body: Hey there. Sorry to hear you're having difficulties. You can exit the gun range at any time by selecting the menu/start button on the left hand controller. Alternatively you can exit via the marked door on the range. This will take you back to the  mission menu. Please do get in touch if you are still experiencing challenges. We'd be thrilled to get you up and running. www.rebellion.co.uk/support
